nasb.text: Mephibosheth said to the king, “Let him even take it all, since my lord the king has come safely to his own house.”

esv.text: And Mephibosheth said to the king, “Oh, let him take it all, since my lord the king has come safely home.”

cnv.text: 米非波設對王說：“我主我王既然已平平安安回宮，所有的一切就都任憑洗巴拿去好了。”

ccb.text: 米非波设说：“把土地都给他吧，我主我王平安地回来就好了。”
